definitions.text: A check; a stop; an act or instance of arresting something.
examples: (Can we add an example for this sense?)

definitions.text: The condition of being stopped, standstill.
The process of arresting a criminal, suspect etc.
examples: State police made a total of 15 drug-related arrests across the city.

definitions.text: To stop the motion of (a person, animal, or body part). .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
To stop or slow (a process, course etc.).
